assets.name: lecture_06_figure_04.png
assets.rationale: Candidate 01 is the clearest and least occluded frame in this window. It shows the blackboard mathematics cleanly: the total energy written as a kinetic term plus a pair-potential term, with the beginning of the partition-function expression below. Candidate 02 is partially blocked by the lecturer's hand and notes, while candidates 03 and 04 include more lecturer intrusion without adding useful mathematical completeness.
assets.subtitle_excerpt: And then the other term is the potential energy.
assets.caption_hint: energy split into kinetic and pair potential terms
